notes: Antigravity subagent orphan cleanup, UNBLOCKED by subagent linking. The recipe spawns parent + 1 foreground subagent (a 1-child variant of the spec's 5-child scenario — the cleanup invariant is identical for any N≥1), waits for parent_linked, then SIGKILLs the parent's agy process so both parent and the orphaned child are reaped without a clean exit. The pid_manager sweep emits process_exited for the parent and cascades to the orphaned child via deleteWithChildren WITHOUT a spurious state_transition to working for the child (issue #321). The child has no own agy process (pid=0, runs inside the parent's invoke) — it is reaped through the parent's children cascade. parent_killed/child_cleanup anchor on parent_turn_start (a landed phase) so the provisional parent_linked phase does not cascade. Model harvested from <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE> ('Gemini 3.1 Pro'). Tokens/cost NOT in the antigravity JSONL.

text: Parent conv-id session appears in ready when transcript.jsonl is written (single-birth, no proc-<PID> presession)
The spawn prompt drives the parent ready → working
The subagent's own conversation transcript materializes at brain/<child>/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl
AntigravityParentConvID binds child.session_id → parent.session_id (the orphan-cleanup precondition)
SIGKILL on the parent's agy process: pid_manager emits process_exited for the parent conv-id

invariants: no state_transition to working for child after parent_turn_start
no state_transition to waiting for child after parent_turn_start
text: The orphaned child is reaped via deleteWithChildren without a spurious working transition (issue #321 invariant)
